series_metadata.series_description: Workforce Investment Act policy letters are available to local workforce investment areas via the Internet. Types of letters may include policy letters, guidance letters and transmittal letters that provide guidance and expectations on the implementation of OWD -( Office of Workforce Development) administered programs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office three years expiration or rescision by an updated policy letter ; Paper: three years expiration or rescision by an updated policy letter
